claim: The manuscript's text structure reflects a mix of prose and verse, with the herbal section being primarily composed of short, rhyming couplets.
evidence_for: Herbal section has higher entropy levels compared to other sections
evidence_against: No clear evidence of rhyme or meter in other sections
